questions.text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed NoSQL database?
questions.explanation: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL database service that provides fast and predictable performance with seamless scalability.

questions.text: Which of the following are valid DynamoDB key types? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: DynamoDB supports two types of primary keys: a simple primary key (partition key only) and a composite primary key (partition key and sort key).

questions.text: What is the maximum size of an item in DynamoDB?
questions.explanation: The maximum item size in DynamoDB is 400 KB, which includes the attribute names and values.

questions.text: Which Amazon SQS feature ensures that a message is delivered at least once?
questions.explanation: Standard SQS queues guarantee at-least-once delivery, meaning each message is delivered at least once but occasionally more than one copy may be delivered.

questions.text: What is the default visibility timeout for an Amazon SQS message?
questions.explanation: The default visibility timeout for an SQS message is 30 seconds. During this period, other consumers cannot see or process the message.

questions.text: Which SNS protocol is NOT supported for subscriptions?
questions.explanation: Amazon SNS supports HTTP/HTTPS, Email, SMS, SQS, Lambda, and application endpoints, but does not support FTP as a subscription protocol.

questions.text: Which EC2 instance purchasing option provides the largest discount compared to On-Demand pricing?
questions.explanation: Spot Instances can provide up to 90% discount compared to On-Demand pricing, making them the most cost-effective option for fault-tolerant workloads.

questions.text: Which of the following are valid EC2 instance states? (Select THREE)
questions.explanation: Valid EC2 instance states include pending, running, stopping, stopped, shutting-down, and terminated. Paused is not a valid EC2 state.

questions.text: Which Elastic Load Balancer type operates at the application layer (Layer 7)?
questions.explanation: Application Load Balancer (ALB) operates at Layer 7 (HTTP/HTTPS) and can route traffic based on content of the request such as URL path, host header, or query string.

questions.text: In CloudFormation, what does the 'Outputs' section do?
options: Defines input parameters for the stack
Declares values that can be imported into other stacks
questions.explanation: The Outputs section declares output values that you can import into other stacks, return in response to describe stack calls, or view in the CloudFormation console.

questions.text: Which CloudFormation intrinsic function is used to reference another resource in the same template?
questions.explanation: Fn::Ref returns the value of the specified parameter or resource. For resources, it typically returns the physical ID or ARN.

questions.text: Which Elastic Beanstalk deployment policy performs an in-place update on all instances simultaneously?
questions.explanation: The 'All at once' deployment policy deploys the new version to all instances simultaneously, causing a brief outage but providing the fastest deployment.

questions.text: Which IAM policy element specifies the actions that are allowed or denied?
questions.explanation: The Action element describes the specific action or actions that will be allowed or denied. Actions are defined using the service namespace and action name.

questions.text: What is the maximum number of IAM policies that can be attached to a single IAM role?
questions.explanation: You can attach a maximum of 10 managed policies to an IAM role. This includes both AWS managed and customer managed policies.

questions.text: Which S3 storage class is best suited for data with unpredictable access patterns?
questions.explanation: S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically moves data between frequent and infrequent access tiers based on changing access patterns, optimizing costs without performance impact.

questions.text: Which of the following are features of Amazon S3? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: S3 supports object versioning to preserve, retrieve, and restore every version of every object, and lifecycle policies to automate transitions between storage classes.

questions.text: What is the minimum size of a VPC CIDR block?
questions.explanation: The minimum size of a VPC CIDR block is /28, which provides 16 IP addresses. The maximum is /16, providing 65,536 IP addresses.

questions.text: Which VPC component allows instances in a private subnet to access the internet for software updates?
questions.explanation: A NAT Gateway enables instances in a private subnet to connect to the internet or other AWS services while preventing the internet from initiating connections with those instances.

questions.text: Which EBS volume type provides the highest IOPS performance?
questions.explanation: Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) volumes can deliver up to 64,000 IOPS per volume, making them the highest-performance EBS volume type for I/O-intensive workloads.

questions.text: What happens to an EBS volume when the attached EC2 instance is terminated by default?
options: The volume is detached and persists
The root volume is deleted, additional volumes persist
All volumes are converted to snapshots
questions.explanation: By default, the root EBS volume has DeleteOnTermination set to true and is deleted. Additional EBS volumes have it set to false and persist after instance termination.

questions.text: Which Auto Scaling policy type adjusts the desired capacity based on a target value for a specific metric?
questions.explanation: Target tracking scaling policies adjust the number of instances to maintain a target value for a specified metric, such as keeping average CPU utilization at 50%.

questions.text: In Amazon SWF, what is the maximum duration for a workflow execution?
questions.explanation: Amazon SWF workflow executions can run for up to 1 year (365 days). This makes SWF suitable for long-running business processes.

questions.text: Which RDS feature provides high availability by maintaining a synchronous standby replica in a different Availability Zone?
questions.explanation: Multi-AZ deployment maintains a synchronous standby replica in a different AZ. In case of failure, RDS automatically fails over to the standby with minimal disruption.

questions.text: Which of the following RDS engines support Read Replicas? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: MySQL and PostgreSQL are among the RDS engines that fully support Read Replicas for read scaling and cross-region replication.

questions.text: What is the maximum message size for Amazon SQS?
questions.explanation: The maximum message size for Amazon SQS is 256 KB. For larger payloads, you can use the Extended Client Library to store the payload in S3.

questions.text: Which IAM feature allows you to grant temporary security credentials to users?
questions.explanation: IAM Roles provide temporary security credentials (via AWS STS) to entities that assume the role, avoiding the need for long-term access keys.

questions.text: Which S3 feature must be enabled to use Cross-Region Replication?
questions.explanation: Versioning must be enabled on both the source and destination buckets to use Cross-Region Replication in Amazon S3.

questions.text: Which DynamoDB feature allows you to perform atomic operations on multiple items across tables?
questions.explanation: TransactWriteItems provides atomic operations across multiple items and tables in DynamoDB, ensuring all operations succeed or all fail together.

questions.text: What is the purpose of an SNS Dead Letter Queue?
options: To store messages that exceed size limits
To hold messages that cannot be delivered to subscribers
questions.explanation: An SNS Dead Letter Queue stores messages that cannot be successfully delivered to subscribed endpoints after the maximum number of delivery retries.

questions.text: Which EC2 placement strategy distributes instances across underlying hardware to minimize correlated failures?
questions.explanation: Spread placement groups place instances on distinct underlying hardware, reducing the risk of simultaneous failures when hardware fails.

questions.text: Which CloudFormation feature allows you to detect changes made outside of CloudFormation to stack resources?
questions.explanation: Drift Detection identifies resources that have been modified outside of CloudFormation management, helping you maintain consistency between the template and actual resources.

questions.text: Which Elastic Beanstalk component represents a collection of AWS resources running an application version?
questions.explanation: An Environment is a collection of AWS resources running an application version. You can deploy multiple environments for one application (e.g., dev, staging, prod).

questions.text: Which of the following are valid VPC endpoint types? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: VPC supports two types of endpoints: Interface endpoints (powered by PrivateLink, using ENIs) and Gateway endpoints (for S3 and DynamoDB, using route table entries).

questions.text: What is the maximum number of Availability Zones that an Auto Scaling group can span?
questions.explanation: An Auto Scaling group can span all Availability Zones within the region where it is created, providing high availability across multiple data centers.

questions.text: Which SWF component makes decisions about the workflow execution flow?
questions.explanation: The Decider is a program that controls the coordination of tasks, processes workflow history events, and schedules activity tasks or signals the workflow to complete.

questions.text: Which DynamoDB capacity mode automatically adjusts throughput based on traffic patterns?
questions.explanation: On-demand capacity mode automatically adjusts to handle varying traffic loads without the need to specify read and write capacity units in advance.

questions.text: Which of the following are benefits of using Amazon SQS FIFO queues? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: SQS FIFO queues provide exactly-once processing (via deduplication) and strict ordering of messages, making them suitable for applications requiring message sequencing.

questions.text: Which EBS snapshot feature allows you to create a volume in a different region?
questions.explanation: Cross-region snapshot copy allows you to copy an EBS snapshot to another region and create volumes from it, enabling disaster recovery and migration scenarios.

questions.text: What is the default session duration when assuming an IAM role via AWS STS?
questions.explanation: The default session duration when assuming a role via STS AssumeRole is 1 hour (3600 seconds). It can be configured between 15 minutes and 12 hours.

questions.text: Which S3 event notification destination is NOT natively supported?
questions.explanation: S3 event notifications can be sent to SNS topics, SQS queues, and Lambda functions. EC2 instances are not a supported notification destination.

questions.text: Which CloudFormation section is mandatory in every template?
questions.explanation: The Resources section is the only mandatory section in a CloudFormation template. It specifies the AWS resources to be created or modified.

questions.text: Which Elastic Beanstalk deployment policy creates a separate set of instances and switches DNS?
questions.explanation: Blue/Green deployment creates a completely separate environment and uses DNS switching (CNAME swap) to redirect traffic from the old to the new environment.

questions.text: Which of the following can be used as targets for an Application Load Balancer? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: ALB supports EC2 instances, IP addresses, Lambda functions, and containers as targets. S3 buckets and CloudFront distributions are not valid ALB targets.

questions.text: What does the DynamoDB Streams feature provide?
questions.explanation: DynamoDB Streams captures a time-ordered sequence of item-level modifications (inserts, updates, deletes) in a DynamoDB table and stores this information for up to 24 hours.

questions.text: What is the maximum retention period for Amazon SQS messages?
questions.explanation: The maximum message retention period for SQS is 14 days. The default is 4 days, and the minimum is 60 seconds.

questions.text: Which SNS feature allows you to filter messages delivered to a subscription?
questions.explanation: A subscription filter policy allows a subscriber to receive only a subset of messages published to a topic, based on message attributes matching the filter criteria.

questions.text: Which of the following are valid Auto Scaling termination policies? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Valid termination policies include OldestInstance, NewestInstance, OldestLaunchConfiguration, ClosestToNextInstanceHour, OldestLaunchTemplate, and Default.

questions.text: In RDS, what is the purpose of a parameter group?
questions.explanation: A parameter group acts as a container for engine configuration values that are applied to one or more DB instances. It allows tuning of the database engine behavior.

questions.text: Which VPC feature allows you to privately connect your VPC to supported AWS services without an internet gateway?
questions.explanation: VPC Endpoints allow you to privately connect your VPC to supported AWS services and VPC endpoint services powered by PrivateLink, without requiring an internet gateway.

questions.text: Which EC2 instance metadata category contains the IAM role credentials for the instance?
questions.explanation: The iam/security-credentials/ path in instance metadata provides temporary security credentials for the IAM role attached to the instance.

questions.text: Which of the following are components of an IAM policy statement? (Select THREE)
questions.explanation: The main elements of an IAM policy statement are Effect (Allow/Deny), Action (what actions), Resource (which resources), and optionally Condition. Duration and Region are not policy elements.

questions.text: What is the maximum number of S3 buckets per AWS account by default?
questions.explanation: By default, you can create up to 100 S3 buckets per AWS account. This limit can be increased by requesting a service limit increase.

questions.text: Which DynamoDB index type allows you to query data using an alternate sort key?
questions.explanation: A Local Secondary Index (LSI) has the same partition key as the base table but a different sort key, allowing queries with an alternate sort key within the same partition.

questions.text: Which CloudFormation helper script is used to retrieve metadata from a resource?
questions.explanation: cfn-get-metadata retrieves metadata for a resource or path to a specific key from the CloudFormation stack, useful for reading configuration data.

questions.text: Which Elastic Beanstalk configuration file is used to customize the environment?
questions.explanation: Configuration files placed in the .ebextensions directory with a .config extension are used to customize and configure your Elastic Beanstalk environment.
